# Daily Report — 2026-05-03

## Task Completed
Added `category` filter to `list_cis`. `ListCIsParams` now accepts an optional
`category` string that appends `category=<value>` to the sysparm_query, consistent
with the existing `operational_status` and `environment` filters. The field was
already present in `CMDB_CI_FIELDS` and `_format_ci` but had no corresponding
query filter.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 878 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 91% (cmdb_tools.py 98%)
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level vulnerabilities in pip/setuptools/wheel/pyjwt — no project code affected.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/cmdb_tools.py` — added `category` field to `ListCIsParams`; added `category=` query part in `list_cis`
- `tests/test_cmdb_tools.py` — added `test_list_with_category_filter`; updated `test_list_params_defaults` to assert `category` is None
